cards.title: Bug Triage
Personal Planner
Sprint Board

package.name: kanban.v1
package.title: Kanban Runtime Pack
package.description: Kanban board runtime pack for HyperCard VM-authored cards.
package.prose:
The Kanban runtime pack exposes a single structured root node, kanban.board, through the
widgets.kanban.board(...) helper. The VM remains responsible for semantic state, handlers, and
action dispatch. The host remains responsible for rendering, drag/drop behavior, and modal UI.

symbols.name: widgets.kanban.board
symbols.summary: Create a Kanban runtime tree consumable by the kanban.v1 host renderer.
symbols.prose:
Use widgets.kanban.board({...}) from a VM card render function to describe the board state and
the event handler bindings. The payload must stay declarative: tasks, columns, filters,
collapsed-column state, and handler descriptors. Do not construct host components directly.

symbols.name: kanbanBugTriage
symbols.summary: Bug triage demo board for kanban.v1.
symbols.prose:
This demo card keeps the same runtime contract as the other Kanban cards, but changes the seeded
tasks and columns to represent a bug-triage workflow.

symbols.name: kanbanPersonalPlanner
symbols.summary: Personal planning demo board for kanban.v1.
symbols.prose:
This demo card models a smaller personal planning workflow and is useful for checking that the
Kanban host renderer handles low-cardinality boards cleanly.

symbols.name: kanbanSprintBoard
symbols.summary: Sprint planning demo board for kanban.v1.
symbols.prose:
This demo card shows a sprint-planning board with backlog, ready, doing, and done columns. It is
the primary smoke-test card for validating the kanban.v1 runtime pack inside os-launcher.
